message:
refactor(fj-lax): unify scan output stacking via stack_axis0 and drop scalar special-case

Remove the branching logic in eval_scan_functional that separately handled
empty values, scalar-only outputs (manually collecting literals and building
a tensor), and the general tensor case. All three paths now funnel through
TensorValue::stack_axis0, which already handles scalars, mixed dtypes, and
higher-rank tensors uniformly.

Add test_scan_functional_scalar_outputs_use_shared_stack_axis0 to verify
that mixed-type scalar outputs (i64 and f64) are correctly promoted and
stacked into an F64 vector by the unified code path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
